tasks.label: Build with javac (UTF-8)
args: $srcs = Get-ChildItem -Path src -Recurse -Filter *.java | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; $out = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE 'Desktop\LTM\DoanLTMMT\build_classes'; if (!(Test-Path $out)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $out | Out-Null }; javac -encoding UTF-8 -d "$out" $srcs
